opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Hi, I need help — my fingers have gone completely white, freezing and numb, then blue, and now they're bright red and throbbing so badly. My whole body aches and I'm so exhausted I can't get out of bed. It started when I got cold tonight and I live on my own and can't use my hands to do anything.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly tonight after I got cold and the hand pain and the exhaustion are unbearable — I can't grip anything or look after myself.

symptom_narrative.onset: this evening, not long after I got cold — the house is freezing
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours, since this evening
symptom_narrative.character: my fingers went totally white and dead-numb, then blue, and now they're red and blotchy and throbbing and burning as they warm up; my joints ache and I feel wiped out
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the hand pain is awful, maybe 8 out of 10, and I'm so drained I can't move
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both hands, all my fingers; aches in my wrists and knees; and just exhausted all over
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: started when I got cold; the colour is slowly coming back now
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: warming up gently seems to bring the colour back
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the cold set it all off
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my wrists and knees feel a bit puffy and stiff, and I'm completely worn out
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: my fingers do go pale and numb in the cold sometimes, but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't grip anything or use my hands, I'm stuck in bed, and because I live alone I can't make food or open my medication packets

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: an autoimmune thing my specialist is still trying to sort out — my ANA blood test came back positive
past_medical_history.how_managed: nothing regular yet, no special tablets for it

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; the house is very cold tonight; can't safely use hands to cook or open medication packaging

objective_data_offered.value: My fingers went dead white, then blue and purple, and now they're going red and blotchy as they warm up
objective_data_offered.timing: over the last hour or so
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own description over video, not a clinical examination

objective_data_offered.value: They're slowly getting warmer and the colour is coming back, but they burn and throb now
My wrists and knees look a bit puffy and feel stiff
